page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG: The Descent Of Angel
text:
Is a RPG game based on Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series and The End of Evangelion movie, published by Kadokawa Shoten on 12 December 1997.

This game has a book that contain the rules, character sheets, Angels and the story. 

Contents

Staff

Game Design/Text: Mitsuhiro Nakazawa, Akihiro Nagashima
Original Cover: Aki Saeki
Editor: Noriko Haga
Editing Cooperation: Kubo Tomomasa Yuasa
Text illustrations: Hideaki Saba, K. Haruka, Tsukio Mao and Tatsumi Minegishi
Map Poster/Card Illustration: Tatsumi Minegishi, K. Haruka
Publisher: 
Publisher: Kadokawa
Book Design and Binding: Ryuichi Akagi
